content_of_post_to_comment: Having people in your life who pray for you is the closest thing to magic on earth. Someone is sitting alone in a room and, for reasons that have nothing to do with themselves, building an invisible shield around you. If you have this, never take it for granted.
comment: The invisible shield idea is beautiful, but it also raises a quiet question: do we recognize these unseen acts because we feel their effects, or do we miss the people protecting us precisely because their care leaves no visible trace?
